creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
bsd@, thank you for the contributions. Please remember to include the requestee in your "maintainer-approval?" tags next time.

Whether bumping PORTVERSION makes much sense is a decision I'll pass to the maintainer, but I'd surmise since this is a meta-port, version changes should only be needed if the set of required port changes, i. e. one of the requisites is removed, or a new one added.
